summary: Big Bank maps to JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM; CIK 0000019617). Latest available snapshot places JPM around $306.34 with a market cap near $826.2B, TTM P/E around 14.9x, P/B around 2.28x, and ROE around 15.7%. Q1 2026 revenue grew 10.0% YoY to $49.84B and EPS grew 17.2% YoY to $5.94. News flow remains mixed-to-positive, with supportive dividend/capital-return and AI/wealth-management themes, while the main risks are credit quality, rates/deposit costs, regulatory capital sensitivity, and macro volatility.
data_quality_notes: Used the latest available morning sweep snapshot because no later night quote was surfaced in the repo.
Financial and valuation figures are taken from the existing JPM research artifacts.
The Big Bank identifier is JPM.
